s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
REMOVE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion from the vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Follow the instructions below carefully as the cushion frame can be deformed easily.

s3.ptxt: Choose a hook to detach first. Place your hands near the hook as shown in the illustration. Then lift the seat cushion to detach the hook.
Repeat the step above for the other hook.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)
REMOVE REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)
REMOVE REAR SEATBACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 rear seat belts from the 3 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Remove the 4 bolts and rear seat back assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion from the vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Follow the instructions below carefully as the cushion frame can be deformed easily.

s3.ptxt: Choose a hook to detach first. Place your hands near the hook as shown in the illustration. Then lift the seat cushion to detach the hook.
Repeat the step above for the other hook.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SIDE SEATBACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and rear side seat back assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)
REMOVE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion from the vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Follow the instructions below carefully as the cushion frame can be deformed easily.

s3.ptxt: Choose a hook to detach first. Place your hands near the hook as shown in the illustration. Then lift the seat cushion to detach the hook.
Repeat the step above for the other hook.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEATBACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the claws and remove the 2 rear seat back covers.

item.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.
Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEATBACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 clamps and then separate the cover.
Remove the 2 bolts and 2 nuts and separate type rear seat back assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER ROOF SIDE GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 clips and 2 claws, and remove the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE TIRE PRESSURE WARNING RECEIVER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and remove the tire pressure warning receiver assembly.
